title: Reformatting with Custom Tube Rack
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol reformats tubes from up to 4 custom tube racks to a 96 deepwell plate. The user has the option to dispense 25ul or 50ul into the deepwell plate. The sample input starts at A11 of the deepwell plate, moving by row.
steps_raw: This protocol reformats tubes from up to 4 custom tube racks to a 96 deepwell plate. The user has the option to dispense 25ul or 50ul into the deepwell plate. The sample input starts at A11 of the deepwell plate, moving by row.
Aspirate 25ul or 50ul from the tube rack to the well plate (start at A11)
Repeat up to the number of samples specified, moving by row
materials_raw: Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
